# CBDescriptor

**Class**

An object that provides further information about a remote peripheral’s characteristic.

## Declaration

```swift
class CBDescriptor
```

## Overview

[doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBDescriptor] and its subclass [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBMutableDescriptor] represent a descriptor of a peripheral’s characteristic. In partcular, [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBDescriptor] objects represent the descriptors of a remote peripheral’s characteristic. Descriptors provide further information about a characteristic’s value. For example, they may describe the value in human-readable form and describe how to format the value for presentation purposes. Characteristic descriptors also indicate whether a characteristic’s value indicates or notifies a client (a central) when the value of the characteristic changes.

[doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBUUID] details six predefined descriptors and their corresponding value types. [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBDescriptor] lists the predefined descriptors and the [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBUUID] constants that represent them.



## Identifying a Descriptor

- **characteristic**: The characteristic to which this descriptor belongs.

## Accessing Descriptor Data

- **value**: The value of the descriptor.

## Services

- **CBService**: A collection of data and associated behaviors that accomplish a function or feature of a device.
- **CBMutableService**: A service with writeable property values.
- **CBCharacteristic**: A characteristic of a remote peripheral’s service.
- **CBMutableCharacteristic**: A characteristic of a local peripheral’s service.
- **CBMutableDescriptor**: An object that provides additional information about a local peripheral’s characteristic.

## Inherits From

- CBAttribute

## Inherited By

- CBMutableDescriptor

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
